name: Little Cheddar Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, dry mustard, paprika, and baking powder.
2. Beat the butter with a fork or electric mixer until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in the grated cheddar cheese and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring with a fork until well blended.
4. On a lightly floured surface, shape the dough into a long roll about 1 3/4 inches in diameter.
5. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap or foil and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, preferably overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
7. Slice the dough into rounds about 1/3 inch thick using a sharp knife.
8. Roll each slice into a ball with your hands.
9. Flatten slightly and place on an ungreased baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 8 minutes in the preheated oven. The biscuits will only brown slightly on the bottom.
